title: hieracium macilentum subsp. macilentiforme
intro: Hieracium macilentum subsp. macilentiforme, also known as slender hawk's-beard or slender hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium macilentum subsp. macilentiforme include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and possibly aiding in the treatment of certain digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in tincture form, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal herb.
